title: No Natural Hostile Spawns
description: Removes natural mob spawns from biomes for a large list of popular biome mods. Structures and Spawners will still spawn mobs.
body:
# 🚫 No More Natural Mobs!

A simple datapack that removes **natural monster spawns** from all biomes in your modpack.  
This is useful for custom progression packs, adventure maps, or servers where mob spawning is handled by other means.

***

## ⚠️ Compatibility

*   This datapack **replaces biome spawn settings**, so it may conflict with other datapacks or mods that modify the same biomes.
*   Load this datapack **after** others if you want to guarantee spawns are disabled.

***

## 🌍 Supported Mods

This datapack removes **natural hostile mob spawns** from the following mods and vanilla biomes:

### 🏞️ Overworld

*   Biomes O’ Plenty (`biomesoplenty`)
*   Biomes We’ve Gone (`biomeswevegone`)
*   Clifftree (`clifftree`)
*   Regions Unexplored (`regions_unexplored`)
*   Terralith (`terralith`)
*   Woodlands (`woodlands`)
*   Wythers Expanded (`wythers`)
*   YUNG’s Cave Biomes (`yungscavebiomes`)
*   Minecraft Vanilla (`minecraft`)

### 🔥 Nether

*   BetterNether (`betternether`)
*   Incendium (`incendium`)
*   NetherEx (`netherex`)

### ❄️/🌌 End & Beyond

*   BetterEnd (`betterend`)
*   Endercon (`endercon`)
*   Enderscape (`enderscape`)
*   Eternal Starlight (`eternal_starlight`)
*   Far End (`far_end`)
*   Nullscape (`nullscape`)
*   Stellarity (`stellarity`)

***

## 🐛 Issues & Requests

If you notice that **mobs are still spawning in a biome**,  
please [open a GitHub issue](https://github.com/ppVon/no-natural-hostile-spawns/issues) and include:

*   The **mod name** (e.g. _Terralith_, _YUNG’s Better End Caves_).
*   The **biome ID** where mobs are still spawning (e.g. `terralith:rocky_jungle`).

If you’d like this datapack to support **biomes from another mod**,  
[open a GitHub issue](https://github.com/ppVon/no-natural-hostile-spawns/issues) with:

*   The **mod name and version**.
*   Optionally, a list of the biome IDs you’d like covered.

***
